body_transformation: The plump rounded body silhouette remains intact, now clad in translucent violet skin revealing swirling crimson mist currents beneath its surface. The leaf bulb on the back dissolves into a wispy, tattered ghostly appendage trailing pale silver vapour. The curled spiral tail tip transforms into a shadowy mist trail that dissolves at the end, while the pale cream underbelly becomes a faintly glowing silver hue with subtle energy ripples. Red eyes with white highlights persist, now filled with swirling ghostly mist instead of pupils.
signature_feature: Back growth: tattered violet mist with crimson energy currents and pale silver trailing vapour.
